name: No doctors note yet after work slip, claim in trouble?
description: See doctor now—med records prove injury.

mainEntity.name: No doctors note yet after work slip, claim in trouble?

acceptedAnswer.text: See doctor now—med records prove injury.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Not yet, but see a doctor ASAP as medical evidence is required for approval.** Delaying treatment weakens Utah/Idaho claims.[1] Key factors: (1) Initial care within days; (2) Consistent records link to work; (3) Insurer picks doctor often. Go to ER if needed. Lawyer ensures proper panel.
